# Copilot instructions

**The canonical agent-instructions for this repository live in
[../CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md).** Read it first — it is the single source of truth
for coding principles, code style, git workflow, commit-message format,
build/test commands, documentation maintenance, and the working process
(one PR per thing; log TODOs in [../TODO.md](../TODO.md) immediately; keep the
roadmap and [../CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md) current).

This file is intentionally a pointer so guidance doesn't drift across tools.
Add or change shared guidance in [../CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md), not here.

**Critical:** no Claude/AI references in commits, PRs, or any public text.
